spacing_and_layout.generous_spacing: Use 2x normal spacing (e.g., py-24 or py-32 for sections, gap-8 or gap-12 for grids).
spacing_and_layout.radii: rounded-2xl for main cards/media, rounded-full for buttons/badges
spacing_and_layout.shadows: Minimal. Use subtle 1px borders (border-gray-200) instead of heavy shadows to maintain a flat, premium look.

components.navbar: Sticky header with backdrop-blur-xl, bg-white/80, 1px bottom border on scroll. Logo left, links center/right, small rounded-full accent CTA right.
components.buttons: Primary: bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-blue-700. Secondary: bg-gray-100 text-gray-900 rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-gray-200.
components.cards: Services cards should be flat, bg-gray-50/50 or bg-white, 1px border-gray-100, large internal padding (p-10), left-aligned text, crisp icons.
components.inputs: Shadcn/UI derived: h-12 bg-gray-50 border-gray-200 focus:border-blue-600 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-600 rounded-xl

motion_and_interactions.scroll_animations: Use framer-motion for subtle slide-up (y: 20 -> y: 0) and fade-in (opacity: 0 -> 1) on scroll for all major sections.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Images slightly scale up inside overflow-hidden containers. Buttons lift and darken slightly.
motion_and_interactions.page_feel: Implement smooth momentum scrolling if possible, otherwise rely on buttery smooth CSS/framer-motion transitions (duration 0.5s, ease-out).

logo.description: Monochrome black 'R' rendered inside a white futuristic resin printer. Use for Navbar and Footer.

hero_video_placeholder.description: White and gray optical illusion used as a placeholder for the muted autoplay looping motion-design video banner.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use framer-motion heavily for smooth entrance animations (staggered children fade in).
Import fonts 'Outfit' or 'Manrope' for headings and 'Inter' for body text via Google Fonts.
Do NOT use typical SaaS shadows (no shadow-md or shadow-xl). Use crisp borders and flat backgrounds for a minimalist high-end feel.
Implement Lucide React icons for the Services section.
Implement a Lightbox modal component (or use a library like react-image-lightbox/framer-motion AnimatePresence) for the Work/Portfolio grid items.
Ensure the Hero video placeholder image acts as a contained banner on the right side or bottom, elegantly framed with rounded-2xl corners, not a full screen background.
Use <form> for the Contact section with standard accessible Inputs and Textarea from shadcn/ui.
Add data-testid attributes to all key interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links) to support automated testing.
